title: anthurium treleasei
intro: Anthurium treleasei, also known as the Trellease's anthurium or velvet anthurium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Latin America, for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anthurium treleasei include its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically or consumed orally.
